fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Make the G1 do a deep squat pose"
"Put the G1 in a hands-on-hips standing pose"
"Make the G1 reach both arms straight out to the sides"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Make the G1 feel heavier and more sluggish"
"Show me what happens if the G1 loses balance"
"Slow down the G1's movements so I can study them better"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a ball the G1 can interact with"
"Give the G1 a waving greeting motion"
"Add a second G1 to the scene"
